message:
docs(beads): enhance 1n78.21.5 compliance runner with explicit logging requirements

Added to flywheel_connectors-1n78.21.5:
- JSONL log stream format with required fields
- Summary report structure (checks_total/passed/failed/skipped)
- CLI interface specification with output modes
- Exit codes for CI integration (0=pass, 1=fail, 2=error)
- CI integration example with artifact upload

This ensures the mechanical connector compliance runner produces
structured, analyzable output consistent with 1n78.35 platform standard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
